evidence: drsam-99657.bubble — api.bTHxY (id bTHxW): sum q1..q5, divide by 5, round to 1 decimal (return bTHxo)
drsam-99657.bubble — bTHxu/bTHyM/bTHyU TriggerCustomEvent → bTHxW then ChangeThing stability_score_number / alignment_score_number / performance_score_number
frontend/src/pages/Onboarding.tsx — passes userId into completeOnboarding deps
drsam-99657.bubble — bTGNJ ScheduleAPIEvent chain bTHVC / bTHja / bTHgY

functional_audit.check: computePillarScore averages five numeric inputs rounded to one decimal, matching Bubble bTHxW/bTHxo and onboarding step inline calculators
calculateUserStability/Alignment/Performance load profile onboarding_data, derive q1–q5, compute score, and patch stability_score_number / alignment_score_number / performance_score_number
Pillar calculator chain is invoked during onboarding completion before dashboard navigation

critiques.finding: Bubble calculate_user_stability (bTHxu) reads sq1_option_customer_stability_answer_os.index from the User type, while readQuestionScores consumes numeric sq1..sq5 nested under stabilityScores/alignmentScores/performanceScores or flat *_number keys in onboarding_data JSONB.
critiques.alternative: Document the JSONB nested-score contract in pillarScoreUserData.ts, or also persist option-set slugs and resolve .index at calculator time for literal UDS field parity.

critiques.finding: Coverage preflight marks reuse_decision new though prototype already computed pillar scores inline in OnboardingStability/Alignment/Performance and owned completeOnboarding.ts — this item extracts and wires existing logic rather than introducing a greenfield surface.
critiques.alternative: Record reuse_decision as gap-fill with existing_files_found including the three onboarding pillar step components whose formulas now delegate to computePillarScore.

critiques.finding: No unit tests cover computePillarScore edge cases (NaN guard, rounding boundaries) or readQuestionScores fallback between flat *_number and nested score maps.
critiques.alternative: Add aggregatePillarScore.test.ts with Bubble-derived fixtures and a pillarScoreUserData.test.ts for nested vs flat onboarding_data shapes.

critiques.finding: completeOnboarding calls runOnboardingProfilePipeline (API-01 through API-05) rather than runPillarScoreCalculators alone; pillar calculators still run first but downstream API items execute in the same completion turn.
critiques.alternative: Acceptable for AUTH-05 end-to-end parity with bTGNJ; split calls only if API-01 must be independently testable without classification/pressure side effects.
